title: cyathea scaberula
intro: Cyathea scaberula, also known as the Rough Tree Fern, is a species of tree fern native to Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which may help to reduce pain, inflammation, and bacterial infections. The health benefits of Cyathea scaberula include its potential to aid in wound healing, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. Cyathea scaberula can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
